operational_scenes.scene_title: Overview of Station Direction and Multi-Phase Validation
operational_scenes.primary_intent: Explain the multi-phase process for validating station direction
operational_intents: Describe how station direction is confirmed during commissioning
Highlight the role of simulation and UAT phases in issue detection
operational_scenes.knowledge_extraction_strategy: Extract multi-phase validation steps and key checkpoints
operational_scenes.why_this_strategy: Clarifies layered validation approach for station direction

operational_scenes.scene_title: Importance and Usage of Note Code and Workstation ID
operational_scenes.primary_intent: Emphasize key identifiers for operational tracking
operational_intents: Identify note code as a critical data point
Explain workstation ID significance and usage
Discuss default values and noise reduction in data
operational_scenes.knowledge_extraction_strategy: Extract key identifiers and their operational relevance
operational_scenes.why_this_strategy: Focuses on critical data elements for system monitoring

operational_scenes.primary_intent: Demonstrate how to view workstation IDs and their relevance
operational_intents: Show method to view workstation IDs despite zoom limitations
Clarify that some data is technical and less relevant operationally
operational_scenes.knowledge_extraction_strategy: Extract user actions and data interpretation guidelines
operational_scenes.why_this_strategy: Supports practical understanding of workstation ID retrieval

operational_scenes.primary_intent: Explain how to identify and check charger status
operational_intents: Describe unique charger IDs and how to access them
Show how to check charger enable/disable status
Identify which robot is charging at a station
operational_scenes.knowledge_extraction_strategy: Extract charger identification and status checking procedures
operational_scenes.why_this_strategy: Enables operational monitoring of charging stations

operational_scenes.scene_title: Handling Low Power AGVs and Charger Disabling
operational_scenes.primary_intent: Describe manual intervention for low power AGVs and charger management
operational_intents: Explain scenarios with low power AGVs stuck in error states
Show how to manually parse AGVs to avoid waiting for automatic logic
Describe logical disabling of chargers to prevent routing
operational_scenes.knowledge_extraction_strategy: Extract manual override procedures and charger disablement logic
operational_scenes.why_this_strategy: Critical for managing exceptions and maintaining system flow
